# NodeLabz — Product Vision & Strategy
# ⚠️ DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE — This is the locked product vision approved by the founder.
# Any changes to product direction must be discussed before modifying this document.

**Date locked:** March 16, 2026
**Approved by:** Federico Tafur
**Status:** LOCKED — Final product vision

---

## Mission

Build the **all-in-one AI data platform** — not just marketing, but the intelligence layer that connects every data source a business touches, visualizes it as a living network, and uses AI to analyze, recommend, and execute across all domains.

**Positioning:** *"The AI that sees your entire business and tells you what's broken, what's working, and what to do next."*

---

## Core Loop

```
INGEST all data → VISUALIZE as network → AI ANALYZES → RECOMMEND actions → EXECUTE across channels → MEASURE results → repeat
```

---

## Platform Expansion Map

### Layer 1: Marketing (CURRENT — Phase 1)
- Meta Ads, Google Ads, TikTok Ads
- GA4 Analytics
- Email Engine
- WhatsApp Business
- Social Media (organic)
- Shopify, Stripe

### Layer 2: Financial (Phase 2 — months 3-6)
- QuickBooks / Xero
- Stripe (deeper — invoices, subscriptions, MRR)
- Bank feeds
- MercadoPago, PayPal
- Invoicing
- Expense tracking

### Layer 3: Customer Success (Phase 3 — months 6-9)
- Support tickets
- NPS / reviews / satisfaction scores
- Churn signals
- Renewal data

### Layer 4: Operations & Team (Phase 4 — months 9-12)
- Google Sheets, Notion, Monday/Asana
- Inventory, shipping/logistics
- Gusto / BambooHR (HR)
- Time tracking, payroll
- Team performance
- Zapier (catch-all connector)

### Layer 5: Sales (Deeper — Phase 2-3)
- CRM pipeline (deeper)
- Proposals / quotes
- Contracts
- Call recordings & transcription
- Meeting scheduler

### Layer 6: Product (Phase 4+)
- Usage analytics
- Feature adoption
- Error tracking

## Visualization Libraries — LOCKED

| Library | Purpose | Status |
|---------|---------|--------|
| **@xyflow/react** v12 | Workflow editor, Node Map, Pipeline Builder | Installed & built |
| **Recharts** v3.8 | Dashboard charts, KPIs, analytics, report builder | Installed & built |
| **@dnd-kit** | Email Builder, Form Builder, Dashboard Builder | Installed & built |
| **Cytoscape.js** | Network graph — full business ecosystem visualization, customer journey networks, integration topology | Installed, demo built |
| **D3.js** | Advanced custom visualizations (Sankey diagrams, treemaps, attribution models) — Report Builder | Planned |
| **Tremor** | Higher-level chart components (KPI cards, sparklines, trend indicators) | Planned |

### NOT building:
- ~~Landing Page Builder~~ — removed from scope (founder decision, March 16 2026)

## Sidebar Structure — All-in-One Vision

```
ICON SIDEBAR:
├── 📊  Dashboard (unified KPIs across everything)
├── 👥  Contactos & CRM
├── 📢  Marketing (ads, email, social)
├── 💰  Finanzas (revenue, expenses, cash flow, invoicing)
├── 📦  Operaciones (inventory, projects, tasks)
├── 🎧  Soporte (tickets, NPS, satisfaction)
├── 👔  Equipo (HR, payroll, performance)
├── 🔄  Automatizaciones (cross-domain workflows)
├── 📈  Reportes (custom report builder)
├── 🔌  Integraciones
└── 🕸️  Node Map (the full business network graph)
```

---

## AI Integration Points

The AI chat panel is the unifying intelligence layer. Context-aware per page:

| Domain | AI Can Do |
|--------|-----------|
| Marketing | "Por que bajaron mis leads?" → highlights broken GA4 in network graph |
| Financial | "Como esta mi cash flow?" → shows revenue vs expenses trend |
| Cross-domain | "Mi gasto en ads subio 30% pero cash flow esta bajo" → suggests pausing worst ROAS channel |
| Customer Success | "Clientes con mas tickets" → identifies churn risk, triggers retention campaign |
| Operations | "Mi equipo cierra mas deals los martes" → suggests concentrating calls that day |
| Network Graph | "Muestrame leads que llegaron por WhatsApp" → Cytoscape highlights those nodes |
| Workflows | "Crea workflow: cuando se paga factura → enviar email de gracias → actualizar CRM" → generates cross-domain automation |

---

## Cross-Domain AI Insights (The Differentiator)

These are insights NO single-domain tool can provide:

- Marketing + Financial: *"Tu gasto en ads subio 30% pero tu cash flow esta bajo. Pausar TikTok (peor ROAS)?"*
- Marketing + Customer Success: *"Clientes de Google Ads tienen 2x mas tickets de soporte que los de referidos"*
- Sales + Operations: *"Tu equipo cierra 40% mas deals los martes. Concentrar llamadas ese dia?"*
- Financial + Customer Success + Marketing: *"Tu MRR subio pero churn tambien. Plan basico churnea 3x mas. Lanzar campaña de upgrade?"*

---

## Pricing Vision

```
STARTER:       $79/mo   (marketing + basic finance)
GROWTH:        $199/mo  (+ ops + support + full AI)
BUSINESS:      $399/mo  (+ team + advanced analytics)
ENTERPRISE:    $799/mo  (multi-company + API + custom integrations)
AGENCY:        $199/mo  per client managed
```

Replaces: HubSpot ($890) + QuickBooks ($80) + Zendesk ($150) + Monday ($40) + data analyst ($3,000) = **$4,160/month replaced with $399**.

---

## Go-To-Market

### Phase 1: LATAM (Costa Rica beachhead)
- Spanish-native, SINPE Movil, WhatsApp-first
- Zero competition in this category
- Target: SMBs, digital agencies, dental/legal/real estate
- Goal: 50-100 paying clients

### Phase 2: US Market Entry
- **Positioning:** "The intelligence layer that sits on top of everything you already use"
- **NOT:** "Another marketing CRM"
- **Entry via agencies:** One agency with 30 clients = 30 accounts from one sale
- **Segments:** Marketing agencies (10-50 clients), e-commerce ($1-10M), local services
- **Requirements:** SOC 2, deeper Salesforce/HubSpot integrations, English-native AI

---

## Tech Stack — LOCKED

| Layer | Technology |
|-------|-----------|
| Frontend | Next.js 16 (App Router) + Tailwind + shadcn/ui |
| Backend | NestJS (TypeScript) |
| AI/Data | FastAPI (Python) + LangChain/LangGraph |
| Database | PostgreSQL via Supabase (RLS, pgvector, Realtime) |
| Auth | Supabase Auth |
| Queue | Trigger.dev |
| Build | Turborepo + pnpm workspaces |
| Monitoring | LangSmith |

---

## The Network Graph — Core Differentiator

The Cytoscape.js network visualization is what makes this platform a category creator. When a business owner sees their ENTIRE operation as a living network:

```
                    [QuickBooks] ── [Cash Flow]
                         │
[Meta Ads] → [Leads] → [CRM] → [Proposals] → [Stripe] → [Revenue]
                │                                              │
          [WhatsApp]                                    [Payroll]
                │                                              │
          [Support Tickets] ← [Customer] → [NPS Score]  [Profit]
```

Click any node → see every connection. Ask AI → get cross-domain insights. No platform on earth does this today.

---

## Plan Tiers & AI Autonomy — LOCKED

| Plan | Read | Write | Approval | Save Workflows | Auto-Activate |
|------|:----:|:-----:|:--------:|:--------------:|:-------------:|
| INICIO | Yes | No | — | No | No |
| CRECIMIENTO | Yes | Yes | Required | Yes | No |
| PROFESIONAL | Yes | Yes | No | Yes | No |
| AGENCIA | Yes | Yes | No | Yes | Yes |

---

## Workflow Node Types — LOCKED

1. **Trigger** — Initiates workflow (new lead, payment received, ticket opened)
2. **Action** — Performs operation (send email, update CRM, create invoice)
3. **Condition** — If/then branching logic
4. **Delay** — Time-based waits

Cross-domain workflows are the key differentiator: a single workflow can trigger from marketing, check financial data, update CRM, and send WhatsApp — across all layers.

---

## Native Integrations — Full List

### Marketing
Meta Ads + CAPI, Google Ads, Google Analytics 4, TikTok Ads, Google Search Console, WhatsApp Business (Meta Cloud API), Shopify, Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, Twitter/X

### Financial
Stripe, QuickBooks, Xero, MercadoPago, PayPal, SINPE Movil (Tilopay)

### Email & Communication
Resend (transactional), Amazon SES (bulk), WhatsApp Cloud API, Ayrshare (social)

### Operations
Google Sheets, Notion, Monday.com, Asana, Zapier

### AI & Data
OpenAI / Claude, LangChain/LangGraph, Microsoft Presidio (PII), Wren AI (SQL), Prophet (forecasting), scikit-learn, Airbyte (data ingestion)

### Video (Phase 3+)
Sora 2 (OpenAI), Higgsfield AI
